task: Count how many TODO comments exist across all .py files in the current directory (recursively) and write the total count to /tmp/clive/result.txt as a single number.
Fetch https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts?_limit=5 and write the results as a simple table with columns 'id' and 'title' to /tmp/clive/result.txt. One row per line, tab-separated.
Analyze app.log: find all ERROR lines, extract the error messages, and write a summary to /tmp/clive/result.txt listing each error with its timestamp.
Create a JSON inventory of all files in the current directory. For each file, include 'name', 'size_bytes', and 'lines' (line count). Write the JSON array to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

success_criteria.check: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/clive/result.txt')); assert isinstance(d, list) and len(d)==3"
